name: zalo-bot-js
description: TypeScript SDK for the Zalo Bot API.

scripts.smoke: node -e "const sdk=require('./dist/src/index.js'); const bot=new sdk.Bot({token:'test-token',request:{initialize:async()=>{},shutdown:async()=>{},post:async()=>({id:'1'})},pollingRequest:{initialize:async()=>{},shutdown:async()=>{},post:async()=>[]}}); if(!sdk.Bot||!sdk.ApplicationBuilder||!sdk.filters){throw new Error('SDK exports are incomplete');} if(typeof bot.on!=='function'||typeof bot.onText!=='function'||typeof bot.startPolling!=='function'||typeof bot.processUpdate!=='function'||typeof bot.setWebHook!=='function'){throw new Error('Node-style bot API is incomplete');} console.log('smoke ok');"
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run build && npm run smoke && npm run test:bot-api

author: KaiyoDev
